description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs, giving it a suburban residential feel. The structure features a low-pitched, rectangular roof in a muted gray tone, with a mix of light-colored and wooden exterior walls. Large windows are visible on the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light inside. The entrance is set back, with a small paved path leading up to it, and there is a modest porch area. The landscaping includes both evergreen and deciduous trees, some with white or purple foliage, enhancing the visual appeal. The overall design is modern yet simple, with clean lines and a functional layout.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a low-pitched roof, large windows, and surrounding trees and shrubs. The exterior combines light and wooden finishes, with a small porch and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Side and front views show the main entrance, large windows, and a mix of light and wooden wall finishes, with trees flanking the structure.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlights the rectangular roof, the paved path to the entrance, and the arrangement of trees around the bungalow.
description_view_2: Opposite side and rear views reveal additional windows, the continuation of the wooden facade, and more landscaping details.
description_view_3: Rear and partial side view shows the back of the bungalow, the porch area, and the distribution of trees and shrubs.
